title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 23.295 - Division of workforce development to assist displaced employees
text:
23.295.  Division of workforce development to assist displaced employees. — If an employee is displaced because a program is sunset, reorganized, or continued, the state agency and the division of workforce development in the department of economic development shall make a reasonable effort to relocate the displaced employee.
(L. 2003 S.B. 299 & 40)
